name: Remission or Mitigation of Forfeiture

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who have incurred or are alleged to have incurred forfeitures under the internal revenue laws.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers may apply for the remission (cancellation) or mitigation (reduction) of forfeitures incurred under internal revenue laws using customs law procedures.
